# Master IR Library: Naim-Topping-B&O Hybrid

### ⚠️ Port Mapping Requirements
*   **Ports 1 & 2 (38kHz):** Standard IR emitters for Topping D90/A90.
*   **Port 3 (40.983kHz):** High-Frequency Blaster for Beomaster 8000. **Must be set to "IR Blaster" in iTach settings.**

---

### 1. Topping A90 Discrete (38kHz - Port 1:2)


| Command | Global Caché IR String |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Volume Up** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |
| **Volume Down** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |
| **Input: XLR** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |
| **Input: RCA** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |
| **Gain Toggle** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |
| **Output Toggle** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |

### 2. Topping D90 DAC (38kHz - Port 1:1)


| Command | Global Caché IR String |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Input: AES** | `sendir,1:2,1,38000,1,1,342,171,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,21,64,21,21,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,64,21,1514` |

---

### 3. Beomaster 8000 / Beolab Terminal (40.983kHz - Port 1:3)
Targets Port 3 on the Global Caché iTach IP2IR. **Requirement:** Set Port 3 to "IR Blaster" mode in the iTach web configuration.


| Command | Global Caché IR String (40.983kHz) |
| :--- | :--- |
| **PH (Vinyl)** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,128,128,128,128,256,128,1024,128,128,128,128,128,256,128,1024,128,128,128,128,128,256,128,4000` |
| **TP1 (Tape 1)** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,256,256,256,128,1024,128,256,256,256,128,1024,128,256,256,256,128,4000` |
| **TP2 (Tape 2)** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,256,128,128,384,1024,128,256,128,128,384,1024,128,256,128,128,384,4000` |
| **RADIO (FM)** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,640,256,1024,128,640,256,1024,128,640,256,4000` |
| **STANDBY (Off)** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,256,256,128,256,1024,128,256,256,128,256,1024,128,256,256,128,256,4000`|
| **VOLUME UP** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,128,128,256,384,1024,128,128,128,256,384,1024,128,128,128,256,384,4000` |
| **VOLUME DOWN** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,128,128,256,128,128,128,1024,128,128,128,256,128,128,128,1024,128,128,128,256,128,128,128,4000` |
| **MUTE** | `` |
| **FILTER** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,256,384,128,128,1024,128,256,384,128,128,1024,128,256,384,128,128,4000` |
| **BALANCE >** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,128,128,512,128,1024,128,128,128,512,128,1024,128,128,128,512,128,4000` |
| **BALANCE <** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,128,128,384,256,1024,128,128,128,384,256,1024,128,128,128,384,256,4000` |
| **FORWARD >>** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,128,256,384,128,1024,128,128,256,384,128,1024,128,128,256,384,128,4000` |
| **REWIND <<** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,128,128,128,512,1024,128,128,128,128,512,1024,128,128,128,128,512,4000` |
| **RECORD** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,128,128,128,256,128,128,1024,128,128,128,128,256,128,128,1024,128,128,128,128,256,128,128,4000` |
| **RETURN** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,128,256,256,256,1024,128,128,256,256,256,1024,128,128,256,256,256,4000` |
|**STOP** | `sendir,1:3,1,40983,1,1,128,128,256,128,128,128,128,1024,128,128,256,128,128,128,128,1024,128,128,256,128,128,128,128,4000` |
